TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Luke_Babbitt, title = Luke_Babbitt, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luke_Babbitt} }

S.FORM: Luke Babbitt hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 6, Luke Babbitt, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Luke Babbitt hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 6, Luke Babbitt, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: luke βaββitt ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, luke βaββitt, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
